'''lazutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yoak|yoak]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-z-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yoak|yoak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lazutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læzitith|læzitith]] || [[word:læzitij|læzitij]] || [[word:læzitish|læzitish]] || [[word:læziti|læziti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lazuzututh|lazuzututh]] || [[word:lazuzutuj|lazuzutuj]] || [[word:lazuzutush|lazuzutush]] || [[word:lazuzutu|lazuzutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lazututh|lazututh]] || [[word:lazutuj|lazutuj]] || [[word:lazutush|lazutush]] || [[word:lazutu|lazutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lazuftuth|lazuftuth]] || [[word:lazuftuj|lazuftuj]] || [[word:lazuftush|lazuftush]] || [[word:lazuftuf|lazuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lazututhu|lazututhu]] || [[word:lazutuju|lazutuju]] || [[word:lazutushu|lazutushu]] || [[word:lazutuku|lazutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lazututh|lazututh]] || [[word:lazutuj|lazutuj]] || [[word:lazutush|lazutush]] || [[word:lazutu|lazutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lazututhul|lazututhul]] || [[word:lazutujul|lazutujul]] || [[word:lazutushul|lazutushul]] || [[word:lazutukul|lazutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lazututhuthu|lazututhuthu]] || [[word:lazutujuju|lazutujuju]] || [[word:lazutushushu|lazutushushu]] || [[word:lazutuku|lazutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lazututhun|lazututhun]] || [[word:lazutujun|lazutujun]] || [[word:lazutushun|lazutushun]] || [[word:lazutukun|lazutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lazututhuoro|lazututhuoro]] || [[word:lazutujuoro|lazutujuoro]] || [[word:lazutushuoro|lazutushuoro]] || [[word:lazutukuoro|lazutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
